name: Ziltivekimab
summary: IL-6 ligand inhibitor with phase 2 inflammatory biomarker evidence and an active phase 3 cardiovascular outcomes trial.
mechanism_summary: Targets IL-6 ligand signaling to reduce inflammatory and thrombotic biomarkers in high-risk chronic kidney disease and cardiovascular populations.

open_questions: Whether phase 3 outcomes confirm that IL-6 biomarker lowering improves clinical events
Whether chronic IL-6 inhibition can be relevant outside high-risk kidney and cardiovascular disease populations
